channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Inflated AI claims are under fire—and the regulatory reckoning is coming
item.description: A top securities litigation partner at Baker McKenzie argues that history—from dot-com fraud to ESG greenwashing—tells us exactly where AI disclosure ...

item.title: Every Notes App I’ve Tried Gets This One Thing Wrong
item.description: Note-taking isn’t really about capturing and storing notes; it’s about what happens next.

item.title: United Airlines CEO just casually admitted that prices might stay high even after the Iran fuel crisis ends
item.description: Many consumers may be pausing their travel plans until whenever the U.S.-Iranian fuel crisis ends. But if you were hoping that airline ticket prices a...

item.title: Warner Bros. shareholders are set to vote on $81 billion mega merger with Paramount
item.description: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders are set to vote Thursday on the company’s proposed $81 billion sale to Skydance-owned Paramount , in a mega merger...

item.title: The Tim Cook Era at Apple Is Over, So What Took This CEO Out?
item.description: Was it AI? Was it Apple TV? Or did the Cult of Apple just kind of lose its luster?

item.title: How to Spot the Red Flags of a Toxic Culture
item.description: Six key warning signs to watch out for.

item.title: American Airlines’ massive new airport lounge will be the biggest in Nashville. It’s designed to feel like home
item.description: American Airlines is leaning further into the idea that airport lounges should feel less like generic waiting rooms and more like extensions of the ci...

item.title: Meta tracking employee keystrokes to train AI is probably legal. Experts say that doesn’t make it ethical
item.description: Employees at Meta Platforms may soon feel like they’re spilling TMI to their employer’s MCI. The parent company of Facebook, Instagram, and WhatsApp i...

item.title: Goldman tackles AI’s missing link: the ‘world model’ that every AI godfather is racing to figure out
item.description: The researchers who built modern AI say it's still missing something fundamental. Goldman Sachs explains what—and why the answer could reshape everyth...

item.title: Current price of oil as of April 23, 2026
item.description: When oil prices change, it affects your energy costs—and even the price of everyday items. Here’s why.

item.title: The Iran War just made the clean energy transition non-negotiable
item.description: I've spent 20 years making the economic case for clean energy. Hormuz just made the geopolitical case — at the cost of many lives and $126-a-barrel oi...

item.title: Stephen and Ayesha Curry talk about the one habit that separates good business leaders from great ones
item.description: The Currys, co-founders of Plezi Hydration, discuss leading with purpose.

item.title: The Vercel Breach Wasn’t Just a Hack. It Was a Trust Failure
item.description: Hackers don’t break in. They log in.

item.title: Why Skilled Trades Are Becoming More Secure Careers in the Age of AI
item.description: The safest jobs today? They might not be behind a desk.

item.title: Prediction market Kalshi just hit these 3 congressional candidates with suspensions and fines
item.description: Three congressional candidates wagered on the outcome of their own elections on Kalshi , according to the prediction market, which said Wednesday that...

item.title: SK Hynix CFO says demand to outstrip supply for at least three years
